notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

hero.name: Tristan Parry
hero.description: Software engineer and designer crafting impactful products for

bottomSlot.description: I build thoughtful, user-centered product experiences, from polished interfaces to full-stack systems.
You can find all of my projects, experiments, and source code on GitHub. Feel free to take a look around!

descriptions.feetback: Bluetooth-enabled insole that tracks foot pressure, alignment, and temperature using a sensor mesh. Data is processed in an embedded system and sent to a mobile app, enabling users and physicians to monitor foot health without specialized assessments.
descriptions.foodfind: A MERN Stack app that finds nearby restaurants in realtime, and allows for restaurant saving in a user's account.
descriptions.multility: Multility, by MATDEV Technologies, is a revolutionary app containing 6 utilities for your convenience and productivity.
descriptions.resonate: A reverb VST plugin for audio processing, built in the JUCE framework (C++). Can be used in any major DAW.
descriptions.rapidkeys: A web app designed to test/improve one's typing speed and accuracy, built with Angular and deployed on Firebase.
descriptions.tristanparry.github.io: My personal portfolio website, built with React, Framer Motion, and Tailwind. The site utilizes flexbox/grid displays, animations, and a GitHub API request.
descriptions.arrayassemble: A sorting algorithm visualizer built in React, including Bubble/Insertion/Merge/Selection sorts and a simple UI.
descriptions.switcher: A unit converter app built in React, supporting currency/length/volume/time conversion, and responsive design.
descriptions.codecompose: A MERN Stack app that renders webdev projects in realtime, and allows for project saving in a user's account.
descriptions.morsecodehangman: Project Group 65's submission for their ECE 198 final prototype (1A Electrical/Computer Engineering, University of Waterloo).
descriptions.p-11-wec2021: Group P-11's submission for the University of Waterloo's 2021 Engineering Competition (Programming section).
descriptions.betterbanking-gui: A user-friendly banking software utilizing 3 account types and a MongoDB database. This is the GUI-enhanced version of the BetterBanking software.
descriptions.betterbanking: A user-friendly banking software with Chequing, Savings, and Investment accounts, that stores Client and Account details in a MongoDB database.
descriptions.tictactoe: A simple tic-tac-toe game, programmed in Java. The game is built with 2D array manipulation and dual-player interaction at its forefront.
descriptions.romannumeralconverter: A simple roman numeral converter for the range [1, 3999], using the subtraction principle and programmed in Java.
descriptions.milkyway: A Discord bot that displays various forms of interstellar information, accessed from NASA/Public ISS APIs.
descriptions.apocalypse: A classic dodging game with retro styling/graphics, programmed in Python, and using the Tk/Turtle libraries
descriptions.perdiem: A to-do list Android app programmed in Java/Android Studio. The app utilizes Cardviews and SharedPreferences saving.
descriptions.monochrome: A platformer game programmed in Python, using the PyGame library. The game includes multi-level/character design.
